double_label.sample_rule: every fifth failed trial after sorting by bundle, mode, task id, and run index

labeler_note: The deterministic double-label sample had no disagreements, so no adjudication override was applied.
labeling_method: closed-set task/diff-signature pass over failed in-scope trials; primary failure is the first unrecoverable failure shape
